mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, TEACHER_IDX, TEACHER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, TEACHER_NAME, TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME, STAGE, TEACHER_BIRTH, TEACHER_SEX, TEACHER_PHONE, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, TEACHER_EMAIL, TEACHER_NATIONALITY, TEACHER_ZIPCODE, TEACHER_ADDRESS, TEACHER_HISTORY, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS ADD_DATE, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE FROM TRAINING_TEACHER WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY TEACHER_IDX DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAINING_TEACHER WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY TEACHER_IDX DESC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, TEACHER_IDX, TEACHER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, TEACHER_NAME, TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME, STAGE, TEACHER_BIRTH, TEACHER_SEX, TEACHER_PHONE, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, TEACHER_EMAIL, TEACHER_NATIONALITY, TEACHER_ZIPCODE, TEACHER_ADDRESS, TEACHER_HISTORY, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE2, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, (SELECT HOMEPAGE_NAME FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}) AS HOMEPAGE_NAME FROM TRAINING_TEACHER WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
SELECT TEACHER_IDX FROM TRAINING_TEACHER WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
SELECT NVL(MAX(TEACHER_IDX), 0) AS teacher_idx FROM TRAINING_TEACHER WHERE MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_TEACHER SET TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME = #{teacher_subject_name}, STAGE = #{stage}, TEACHER_SEX = #{teacher_sex}, TEACHER_PHONE = #{teacher_phone}, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE = #{teacher_cell_phone}, TEACHER_EMAIL = #{teacher_email}, TEACHER_NATIONALITY = #{teacher_nationality}, TEACHER_ZIPCODE = #{teacher_zipcode}, TEACHER_ADDRESS = #{teacher_address}, TEACHER_HISTORY = #{teacher_history}, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE = #{teacher_history_manage}, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, FILE_NAME = #{file_name}, REAL_FILE_NAME = #{real_file_name}, FILE_EXTENSION = #{file_extension}, FILE_SIZE = #{file_size} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.delete: UPDATE TRAINING_TEACHER SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT a.teacher_idx, a.TEACHER_NAME, a.TEACHER_BIRTH, a.TEACHER_SEX, a.TEACHER_PHONE, a.TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, a.TEACHER_EMAIL, a.TEACHER_ADDRESS, b.TRAINING_NAME, b.TRAINING_COUNT, a.TEACHER_HISTORY , b.START_DATE, b.END_DATE, b.START_TIME, b.END_TIME , (ROUND((TO_DATE(b.END_TIME, 'HH24:MI')-TO_DATE(b.START_TIME, 'HH24:MI'))*24*60/60, 1) * b.TRAINING_COUNT) AS TOTAL_TIME , (SELECT CATEGORY_NAME FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX) AS CATEGORY_NAME , (SELECT GROUP_NAME FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_GROUP WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX) AS GROUP_NAME , TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE2 FROM TRAINING_TEACHER a, TRAINING b WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND a.TEACHER_IDX = b.TEACHER_IDX AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}

SELECT a.TEACHER_NAME, a.TEACHER_BIRTH, a.TEACHER_SEX, a.TEACHER_PHONE, a.TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, a.TEACHER_EMAIL, a.TEACHER_ADDRESS, b.TRAINING_NAME, b.TRAINING_COUNT, a.TEACHER_HISTORY , b.START_DATE, b.END_DATE, b.START_TIME, b.END_TIME , (ROUND((TO_DATE(b.END_TIME, 'HH24:MI')-TO_DATE(b.START_TIME, 'HH24:MI'))*24*60/60, 1) * b.TRAINING_COUNT) AS TOTAL_TIME , (SELECT CATEGORY_NAME FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX AND CATEGORY_IDX = b.CATEGORY_IDX) AS CATEGORY_NAME , (SELECT GROUP_NAME FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_GROUP WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND GROUP_IDX = b.GROUP_IDX) AS GROUP_NAME , TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE2 FROM TRAINING_TEACHER a, TRAINING b WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND a.TEACHER_IDX = b.TEACHER_IDX AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx}

SELECT a.TEACHER_NAME, b.TRAINING_NAME, b.TRAINING_COUNT, a.TEACHER_HISTORY, a.TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE , b.START_DATE, b.END_DATE, b.START_TIME, b.END_TIME , (ROUND((TO_DATE(b.END_TIME, 'HH24:MI')-TO_DATE(b.START_TIME, 'HH24:MI'))*24*60/60, 1) * b.TRAINING_COUNT) AS TOTAL_TIME , #{cert_seq_num} AS CERT_SEQ_NUM FROM TRAINING_TEACHER a, TRAINING b WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND a.TEACHER_IDX = b.TEACHER_IDX AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx}
SELECT * FROM TRAINING_TEACHER_AGREE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_key = #{member_key}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAINING_TEACHER_AGREE SELECT homepage_id, teacher_idx, teacher_id, member_key, teacher_name, teacher_subject_name, stage, teacher_birth, teacher_sex, teacher_phone, teacher_cell_phone, teacher_nationality, teacher_zipcode, teacher_address, teacher_history, file_name, real_file_name, file_extension, file_size, confirm_yn, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id, delete_yn, self_info_yn, teacher_history_manage, teacher_email, teacher_history_manage2, SYSDATE FROM TRAINING_TEACHER WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_key = #{member_key}
